displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #4: The Trials of a Jedi
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 4 is the fourth issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption series of comics. It was published on October 28, 1998 by Dark Horse Comics.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #4: The Trials of a Jedi
